name: PRECIGEN, INC.
summary: PART I Overview We are a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in the advancement of innovative precision medicines to improve the lives of patients. We are leveraging our proprietary technology platforms to develop product candidates designed to target urgent and intractable diseases in our core therapeutic areas of immuno-oncology, autoimmune disorders, and infectious diseases.
